description: Composition:Purple round neck t-shirt made of 70% cotton and 30% viscose, with bold chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking 5. Remove promptly 6. Line dry inside out in shade 7. Warm iron only 8. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Regular FitCelebrate those bachelor days in this purple round neck tee from mr.men. A great casual t-shirt that brings back memories of those messy days at the dorm, it looks great when paired with jeans.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-19"
